'''hawadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thaba|thaba]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thaba|thaba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hawadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæwædhæth|hæwædhæth]] || [[word:hæwædhæj|hæwædhæj]] || [[word:hæwædhæsh|hæwædhæsh]] || [[word:hæwædhæ|hæwædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawawadhath|hawawadhath]] || [[word:hawawadhaj|hawawadhaj]] || [[word:hawawadhash|hawawadhash]] || [[word:hawawadha|hawawadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawadhath|hawadhath]] || [[word:hawadhaj|hawadhaj]] || [[word:hawadhash|hawadhash]] || [[word:hawadha|hawadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawafdhath|hawafdhath]] || [[word:hawafdhaj|hawafdhaj]] || [[word:hawafdhash|hawafdhash]] || [[word:hawafdhaf|hawafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawadhatha|hawadhatha]] || [[word:hawadhaja|hawadhaja]] || [[word:hawadhasha|hawadhasha]] || [[word:hawadhaka|hawadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawadhath|hawadhath]] || [[word:hawadhaj|hawadhaj]] || [[word:hawadhash|hawadhash]] || [[word:hawadha|hawadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawadhathal|hawadhathal]] || [[word:hawadhajal|hawadhajal]] || [[word:hawadhashal|hawadhashal]] || [[word:hawadhakal|hawadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawadhathatha|hawadhathatha]] || [[word:hawadhajaja|hawadhajaja]] || [[word:hawadhashasha|hawadhashasha]] || [[word:hawadhaka|hawadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawadhathan|hawadhathan]] || [[word:hawadhajan|hawadhajan]] || [[word:hawadhashan|hawadhashan]] || [[word:hawadhakan|hawadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawadhathaoro|hawadhathaoro]] || [[word:hawadhajaoro|hawadhajaoro]] || [[word:hawadhashaoro|hawadhashaoro]] || [[word:hawadhakaoro|hawadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
